title: TreeTimber
body:
![TreeTimber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6860ab5a1f088eb85ef81d424f9318cffc716580.png)

TreeTimber – Chop smarter, not harder!

Tired of punching trees one block at a time? With **TreeTimber**, you can instantly fell entire trees—including **Crimson Stems**—with a single swing! No more awkward sneaking or weird keybinds. This mod puts **you** in control:

✅ **Break full trees instantly (including nether wood)** \
✅ **No accidental breaks – activation is done only via command** \
✅ **Perfect for survival, modpacks & servers** \
✅ **HUD if TreeTimber is enabled**

Just use the /treetimber command to activate, and chop away. Want to play it safe again? Turn it off anytime with /treetimber. Simple, right?.

Stay efficient. Stay in control. Timber like a pro! 🌲🪓


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Kz_SMclb-EM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

\
![Future Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd91295dccfa16bbfd93979422440d02d42890e5.png)

- Config to enable "only break naturally placed blocks" or "one axe to break them all"
